description: bill of quantities summary page listing each work-section bill and its total, plus the project grand total

projectName.description: the project or plot identifier the bill of quantities is for.

bills.description: each work-section bill listed in the summary, with its number, name, and total. exclude the project grand total row.

billName.description: the bill / work-section name exactly as printed.

amount.description: the bill total amount, numeric only without currency symbol or thousands separators.

grandTotal.description: the project grand total exclusive of credits, adjustments and VAT, numeric only.
